description: Join the Binance Masterclass for a three-day crypto trading course focusing on DeFi. The session includes insights on crypto fundamentals, trading strategies, and identifying scams. Participants will learn from industry experts and engage with a community of crypto enthusiasts.
topic_summary: The Binance Masterclass covers essential topics in cryptocurrency trading, including fundamentals, profit strategies, and DeFi insights, aimed at both beginners and experienced traders. [t=34:01] [t=175:27]
